description_long: This is a modern apartment building with four stories, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior is predominantly white with large, evenly spaced windows and several balconies on two sides, providing outdoor space for residents. The building is surrounded by a low wall and includes landscaped green areas and paved walkways. There is a main entrance at the front, as well as a secondary entrance and a garage door visible from the rear. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with some greenery integrated into the perimeter. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with a focus on functionality and urban living.
description: A four-story modern apartment building with white walls, large windows, balconies, and landscaped surroundings. The design is minimalist and functional, with a flat roof and clean lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, multiple balconies, and landscaped greenery along the perimeter.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting a large garage door, secondary entrance, and green space adjacent to the building.
description_view_2: Side view displaying a symmetrical arrangement of windows, the main entrance, and a fenced walkway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional balconies and dense greenery along the boundary wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical grid pattern on each facade, with consistent spacing and alignment across all floors. Some windows are grouped in pairs, while others are evenly distributed individually.
